mapper.select: SELECT p.panel_id, p.last_communicated_at FROM panel p INNER JOIN site s ON s.site_id = p.site_id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND p.last_communicated_at IS NOT NULL AND p.last_communicated_at < #{thresholdAt} AND p.status != 'OFFLINE'
mapper.update: UPDATE panel SET status = 'OFFLINE', is_online = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE panel_id = #{panelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status != 'OFFLINE'
